center.name: 澳門
center.summary: 澳門是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括黑嘴鸥、白喉红臀鹎、黑脸噪鹛，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sooty-headed bulbul can be found in Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand, Burma, southern China, Hong Kong, Macao, Malaysia, Singapore and Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in China, Japan, North Korea, South Korea, Macau, Russia, Taiwan, and Vietnam. Its natural habitats are estuarine waters and intertidal marshes
